roles.name: Deputy Director of Parks
roles.description: Architect of the binder — designs the master plan that turns Lot 48 into something the people of Pawnee will actually love.

roles.name: Pit-to-Park Project Lead
roles.description: Runs the subcommittee, books the conference room, brings the waffles, and answers to City Council.

roles.name: Permit Desk Administrator
roles.description: Steward of the filing cabinet — keeps every form, layout, and permission set in triplicate.

roles.name: Workshop Engineer
roles.description: Builds custom swings, bespoke benches, and the occasional Apex trigger in the city workshop.

roles.name: City Manager — USA
roles.description: Sets the standard for excellence in municipal Salesforce craft. Literally vibrates with enthusiasm.

roles.name: Senior Parks Planner — Indianapolis
roles.description: Veteran planner from the regional office — patrols the borders of scope with practiced calm.

roles.name: Junior Parks Planner — Indianapolis
roles.description: Fresh from planning school — runs site surveys, configuration, and permit drafts under the senior planner's eye.

roles.name: Sister-City Liaison Architect
roles.description: Architect of the great bridges between Pawnee, Eagleton, Indianapolis, and the state DMV.

roles.name: Sister-City Senior Liaison
roles.description: Builds the API spans across municipal boundaries under the Liaison Architect's plan.

roles.name: Sister-City Junior Liaison
roles.description: Apprentice in the dark arts of webhooks, batch jobs, and the legendary Indiana State Government file format.

roles.name: Health Inspector
roles.description: Tours every booth, every burger, every build — finds the violations before opening day.

roles.name: Entertainment 720 Director
roles.description: Leads all media spectacle — banners, billboards, and the occasional horse made of cake.

roles.name: Senior Campaign Strategist
roles.description: Plans the Knope-for-Council push — debate prep, doorknocks, and yard-sign theory.

roles.name: Campaign Field Coordinator
roles.description: On the ground daily with flyers, hand-shakes, and the iron-clad belief that the candidate is going to win.

roles.name: Subcommittee Scribe
roles.description: Records every motion, every tabled item, every weird Pawnee bylaw — translates citizen rage into requirements.

roles.name: Senior Workshop Engineer — USA
roles.description: Lead carpenter on the gazebo — owns the deep technical builds and mentors the workshop crew.

roles.name: Parks Intern
roles.description: Coffee, copier, configuration. Learning the trade one binder at a time. Treat well — interns become Leslie.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Pawnee Businesses — Local Vendor CRM Rollout

children.name: Crazy Ira & The Douche Sound Check

parks-department.name: Pit Discovery Sign-off
parks-department.description: Discovery gate — Leslie's binder approved by the subcommittee.

parks-department.name: Fill the Pit
parks-department.description: Build kickoff: dump trucks roll into Lot 48.

parks-department.name: Subcommittee Mid-Review
parks-department.description: Mid-project gate: forum with the citizens of Pawnee — expect yelling.

parks-department.name: Harvest Festival Invoice
parks-department.description: Phase invoice triggered when the Lil' Sebastian booth opens.

parks-department.name: Park Grand Opening
parks-department.description: Go-Live: ribbon-cut at the Pawnee Commons.

parks-department.name: Hand-off to Garry
parks-department.description: Hyper-care close: maintenance handed to Garry. He'll do his best.

city-hall-government.name: Council Caucus Kickoff
city-hall-government.description: Project kickoff — convened in Chamber, opened with the gavel.

city-hall-government.name: Roll-Call Module Live
city-hall-government.description: Build phase: voting module deployed in time for the next session.

city-hall-government.name: Public Forum Acceptance
city-hall-government.description: UAT gate — opened to public comment. Survived.

city-hall-government.name: Mayor's Sign-off
city-hall-government.description: Go-Live: Mayor Gunderson stamps the ordinance from his bed.

city-hall-government.name: Final Budget Reconciliation
city-hall-government.description: Final invoice — Ben balances the books to the penny.

city-hall-government.name: Council Hand-off
city-hall-government.description: Hyper-care close: ops transferred to the City Clerk's office.

pawnee-businesses.name: Chamber Discovery Gate
pawnee-businesses.description: Discovery: chamber members enrolled, intent letters signed.

pawnee-businesses.name: Vendor Portal Build Begins
pawnee-businesses.description: Build kickoff — first integrations stood up for Tom's Bistro.

pawnee-businesses.name: Health Inspector Walkthrough
pawnee-businesses.description: Mid-project gate: Pawnee Health passes the build (barely).

pawnee-businesses.name: Snake Juice Launch Day
pawnee-businesses.description: Go-Live: portal opened, Snake Juice flowing, regret immediate.

pawnee-businesses.name: Entertainment 720 Invoice
pawnee-businesses.description: Final invoice — paid in cologne, jet skis, and a small amount of cash.

pawnee-businesses.name: Chamber Hand-off
pawnee-businesses.description: Hyper-care close: portal handed to the Chamber's permanent staff.

eagleton-rivals.name: Border Survey Sign-off
eagleton-rivals.description: Discovery — fence audited, asset list reconciled with the Eagleton clerks.

eagleton-rivals.name: Reconciliation Engine Built
eagleton-rivals.description: Build phase: pipeline live, premium-tier objects mapped.

eagleton-rivals.name: Joint Council Acceptance
eagleton-rivals.description: UAT gate — Pawnee and Eagleton councils convene without a fistfight.

eagleton-rivals.name: Town Sign Replacement
eagleton-rivals.description: Go-Live: Eagleton's signs come down, Pawnee's go up.

eagleton-rivals.name: Bankruptcy Reconciliation
eagleton-rivals.description: Final invoice — what's left of Eagleton's treasury changes hands.

eagleton-rivals.name: Eagleton Hand-off
eagleton-rivals.description: Hyper-care close: Eagleton operations folded into Pawnee Parks.

Leslie Knope.notes: Galentine's Day brunch — non-negotiable, waffles required.

Ron Swanson.notes: Off-grid in his cabin. Do not contact. Do not even think about it.

Tom Haverford.notes: Networking trip to a Vegas pool party — strictly business, treat-yo-self adjacent.

April Ludgate.notes: Halloween prep with Andy. Allegedly a funeral.

Andy Dwyer.notes: Mouse Rat practice — opening for a bar mitzvah.

Donna Meagle.notes: Treat. Yo. Self. Spa weekend in Indianapolis.

Garry Gergich.notes: Daughter's recital — also nobody noticed he was gone.

Ben Wyatt.notes: Star Wars convention — Calzone Zone panel attendance mandatory.

Chris Traeger.notes: Annual triathlon — LITERALLY the highlight of his year.

Bobby Newport.notes: Family yacht in the Mediterranean. He doesn't know what week it is.

Jean-Ralphio Saperstein.notes: Faking his own death for insurance money. Allegedly.

Perd Hapley.notes: The reason for his time off is that he is taking time off.

Lindsay Carlisle Shay.notes: Eagleton spa retreat — Pawnee mention prohibited.
